title: Creation of airport districts; notice of intention
doc_html:
§313.  Creation of airport districts; notice of intention

The governing authority of each political subdivision whose territory is to be included within a proposed airport district shall give notice of intention to create the airport district.  The notice shall be ordered by resolution stating the territory of which the district is to be composed and the proposed boundaries of the district.  The notice shall embrace substantially all matters required to be in the resolution ordering the notice, and shall set forth in addition the date, hour, and place at which the governing authority will in open session conduct a hearing and proceed to create the district.

Amended by Acts 1975, No. 659, §1.  Acts 1983, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 26, §1, eff. Jan. 19, 1983.

§313.  Creation of airport districts; notice of intention
The governing authority of each political subdivision whose territory is to be included within a proposed airport district shall give notice of intention to create the airport district.  The notice shall be ordered by resolution stating the territory of which the district is to be composed and the proposed boundaries of the district.  The notice shall embrace substantially all matters required to be in the resolution ordering the notice, and shall set forth in addition the date, hour, and place at which the governing authority will in open session conduct a hearing and proceed to create the district.
Amended by Acts 1975, No. 659, §1.  Acts 1983, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 26, §1, eff. Jan. 19, 1983.
